solution:  
```java
class Solution {
    public int subtractProductAndSum(int n) {
        int product = 1;
        int sum = 0;
        while (n > 0) {
            int digit = n % 10;
            product *= digit;
            sum += digit;
            n /= 10;
        }
        return product - sum;
    }
}
```

efficiency: HIGH  
time complexity: O(log n)  
space complexity: O(1)  
energy implications: LOW  
explanation: The algorithm extracts each digit of the number using modulo and division operations, computing the product and sum in a single pass. It is efficient with constant space and logarithmic time relative to the number of digits in the input.
